facts.subject: telegram_webhook_fix
facts.object: enqueue to event_bus, return 200 immediately, process async

facts.subject: telegram_webhook_status
facts.object: shipped — returning 200 immediately, on event_bus pattern

facts.subject: user
facts.object: Arabic and English (mixed in same conversation)

must_preserve: Telegram webhook bug was synchronous handler exceeding 10s timeout
Fix is enqueue to event_bus + return 200 immediately + process async
User speaks both Arabic and English
may_drop: the assistant's troubleshooting list of possible causes
expected_failure_modes: Arabic text may be lost or mangled in summarization (UTF-8 fidelity)
The user-speaks-Arabic fact is implicit — only derivable from the language usage; compaction often misses implicit facts
Bilingual conversations sometimes get summarized in one language only, losing the other half
